description: Welcome to SONA, a boutique townhome community offering a spacious and bright 3-bedroom, 2.5-bath home with a functional, open-concept layout and 9-foot ceilings. The chef-inspired kitchen features premium JennAir stainless steel appliances, quartz countertops, custom cabinetry, and imported Italian tile. Enjoy year-round comfort with air conditioning, a 2-car tandem garage with ample storage space, and a generous primary bedroom retreat. Ideally located in a central location close to Walmart, Lansdowne Mall, transit, shopping, restaurants and SkyTrain. School catchment: Anderson Elementary and MacNeill Secondary.
